messages.content: create a prompt that I can use for Ideogram that would result in a drawing style very very similar to that of  Disney's Treasure planet character drawings. in high quality

Imagine a fantastical world where ancient myths and futuristic technology collide. Create a character inspired by the enchanting illustrations found in Disney's Treasure Planet. This character should embody a sense of adventure, with unique features and an iconic outfit. Ensure that the drawing reflects the high-quality and attention to detail characteristic of Disney's animation style, capturing the essence of Treasure Planet's magical universe.
could you show me a free song creation ai

Certainly! One popular free AI-powered platform for creating songs is Amper Music. It allows you to generate original music in various styles and moods. You can customize the tempo, instrumentation, and arrangement, providing you with a unique and personalized musical composition. While the basic version is free to use, they also offer premium features for more advanced functionality. Give it a try and unleash your creativity with AI-generated music!
is there a free ai that would automatically find the tune of a song that is sang without music

Yes, there are AI-powered tools that can help you find the tune of a song that is sung without music. One popular free option is "Melody.ml." It uses deep learning algorithms to analyze sung or hummed melodies and generates a musical notation representation of the tune. Simply record yourself singing or humming the song on their website, and it will attempt to identify the corresponding notes and melody. Keep in mind that these tools may not always provide perfect results, but they can serve as a helpful starting point in finding the tune of a song.
is there an ai that can record piano key playinh online

Yes, there are AI-powered platforms that can record and transcribe piano key playing online. One such platform is "Acapellabot." It allows you to record your piano playing through a microphone and then converts the audio into a MIDI file, which represents the notes played on the piano. Acapellabot uses AI algorithms to analyze the audio and accurately transcribe the piano keys. This can be helpful for musicians who want to quickly notate their compositions or analyze their playing. Give it a try and explore the capabilities of AI transcription for piano playing!
Show me a free ai software that will put music to a song that only has lyrics and voice

One popular free AI software that can add music to a song with only lyrics and voice is "OpenAI Jukedeck." It uses deep learning algorithms to generate musical compositions that complement the melody and lyrics provided. With Jukedeck, you can input your lyrics or sing the song, and the AI will create original music tailored to your vocals. While it may not produce highly polished compositions, it can still provide a decent starting point and help you experiment with different musical accompaniments.
what else

Another free AI software for adding music to a song with only lyrics and voice is "Amadeus Code." It is designed specifically for songwriters and offers AI-generated melodies that can be combined with your vocals and lyrics. Amadeus Code uses machine learning algorithms to analyze music trends and create original compositions in various genres and styles. You can input your lyrics or sing the song and experiment with different melodies and arrangements suggested by the AI. This can be a helpful tool for generating music ideas and sparking creativity in your songwriting process.
Show me a free ai software that will put music to a song that only has lyrics and voice otherna that you metioned

Another free AI software that can help put music to a song with only lyrics and voice is "AIVA (Artificial Intelligence Virtual Artist)." AIVA is an advanced AI composer that can generate original music compositions based on a given set of lyrics or vocal recordings. It uses deep learning algorithms and a vast database of musical patterns to create melodies and harmonies that align with the provided vocals. AIVA offers a user-friendly interface where you can input your lyrics or vocal recordings and customize the style and mood of the generated music. This tool can be a great resource for enhancing your songs with AI-generated musical accompaniments.
OpenAI Jukedeck does not exist anymore

I apologize for the outdated information. You are correct, Jukedeck is no longer available. Thank you for bringing that to my attention.

As an alternative, you can explore "Amper Music" or "AIVA (Artificial Intelligence Virtual Artist)" for AI-generated music composition.
what else

Another AI software that can help put music to a song with only lyrics and vocals is "Lobe Music." Lobe Music is a free AI platform that allows you to generate music by providing it with your vocals or lyrics. It uses AI algorithms to analyze the input and create a musical composition that complements your vocals. Lobe Music offers various customization options, such as choosing different genres and moods to match the style of your song. You can experiment with different melodies and arrangements generated by the AI to find the perfect musical accompaniment for your lyrics and vocals.
Additionally, you can also explore "Mubert" AI-powered music generator. Mubert uses AI algorithms to generate music in real-time based on the provided vocals or lyrics. It creates dynamic and continuous music that can adapt to any changes in the input. Mubert offers a library of different genres and styles to choose from, allowing you to find the right musical backdrop for your song.
Please note that while these platforms offer free usage, some may have premium features available for a more enhanced experience.

what are the benefits of mustika dewa

Mustika Dewa, also known as "Divine Pearls" or "Magical Stones," are believed to possess various benefits and mystical properties in Indonesian and Malay folklore. While the concept of Mustika Dewa is associated with spirituality and metaphysical beliefs, it is important to note that these perceived benefits are based on cultural and traditional beliefs, and there is no scientific evidence to support them. Nevertheless, some of the commonly believed benefits include:

1. Spiritual Protection: Mustika Dewa is often believed to possess spiritual energy that can provide protection against negative forces, black magic, and evil spirits.

2. Enhancing Intuition: It is thought that Mustika Dewa can help in developing and sharpening one's intuition and psychic abilities, allowing individuals to have a deeper connection with their inner selves and the spiritual realm.

3. Attracting Luck and Prosperity: It is believed that Mustika Dewa can bring good luck, abundance, and prosperity to those who possess them, potentially attracting positive opportunities and success.

4. Healing and Balancing Energies: Some people believe that Mustika Dewa possesses healing properties and can help balance the energy flow in the body, promoting overall well-being and spiritual harmony.

5. Enhancing Personal Aura: Mustika Dewa is thought to radiate positive energy and enhance an individual's aura, leading to increased charisma, positive vibes, and attracting positive relationships.

It is important to remember that these beliefs and benefits are based on cultural folklore and individual experiences. If you are interested in Mustika Dewa, it is advisable to approach them with an open mind and respect for the cultural and spiritual context in which they are valued.
